'''bakotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickelback|nickelback]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-k-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickelback|nickelback]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bakotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæketheth|bæketheth]] || [[word:bækethej|bækethej]] || [[word:bækethesh|bækethesh]] || [[word:bækethe|bækethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bakokothoth|bakokothoth]] || [[word:bakokothoj|bakokothoj]] || [[word:bakokothosh|bakokothosh]] || [[word:bakokotho|bakokotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bakothoth|bakothoth]] || [[word:bakothoj|bakothoj]] || [[word:bakothosh|bakothosh]] || [[word:bakotho|bakotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bakofthoth|bakofthoth]] || [[word:bakofthoj|bakofthoj]] || [[word:bakofthosh|bakofthosh]] || [[word:bakofthof|bakofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bakothotho|bakothotho]] || [[word:bakothojo|bakothojo]] || [[word:bakothosho|bakothosho]] || [[word:bakothoko|bakothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bakothoth|bakothoth]] || [[word:bakothoj|bakothoj]] || [[word:bakothosh|bakothosh]] || [[word:bakotho|bakotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bakothothol|bakothothol]] || [[word:bakothojol|bakothojol]] || [[word:bakothoshol|bakothoshol]] || [[word:bakothokol|bakothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bakothothotho|bakothothotho]] || [[word:bakothojojo|bakothojojo]] || [[word:bakothoshosho|bakothoshosho]] || [[word:bakothoko|bakothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bakothothon|bakothothon]] || [[word:bakothojon|bakothojon]] || [[word:bakothoshon|bakothoshon]] || [[word:bakothokon|bakothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bakothothoro|bakothothoro]] || [[word:bakothojoro|bakothojoro]] || [[word:bakothoshoro|bakothoshoro]] || [[word:bakothokoro|bakothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
